title: Phaser Performance Improvements Behind CodeGrind's City Mode Updates
summary: Recent CodeGrind updates focused on Phaser performance: background preloading, cleaner input handling, route-aware keyboard control, and pause-resume fixes.

social.bluesky_text: CodeGrind sharpens Phaser performance in City Mode with background preloading, cleaner input, route-aware keyboard control, and pause-resume fixes. These updates improve stability and responsiveness across existing scenes....
social.linkedin_text: CodeGrind has rolled out Phaser performance improvements behind City Mode updates, focusing on background preloading, asset management, keyboard cleanup, and pause-resume behavior to make interactive scenes more stable within the app shell. This work addresses lifecycle efficiency in a React-style web app with embedded game scenes. https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/06/08/phaser-performance-improvements-city-mode/
